summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PlanMyLuxe luxury travel search/filter website. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality working excellently with only minor mobile filter interaction issues that were previously identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Filter checkboxes in mobile modal have interaction issues - elements are visible but clicks timeout due to z-index or event handling problems

passed_tests: Backend API health check (200 OK)
Filter options endpoint returns 22 destinations and 3 holiday types
Search endpoint returns 503 total hotels with pagination
Search by query 'greece' returns 93 filtered results
Search by destination 'greece' returns 28 filtered results
Search by 5-star rating returns 221 filtered results
Search by holiday type 'all-inclusive' returns 31 filtered results
Price range filtering (500-2000) returns 33 results
All sort options working (best, price_asc, price_desc, rating_desc, newest)
Pagination working (page 1 and page 2 with different page_size)
Combined filters working (greece + 5-star + price_min)
Homepage loads with PML-style hero banner, search bar, trending deals
Homepage search bar redirects to /search page with query parameter
Search page loads with proper filter sidebar and 503 deals
Desktop filter functionality working perfectly (rating, destination, holiday type)
Active filter tags display correctly
Clear all filters functionality working
URL state management working (filters reflected in URL)
Sort options working correctly
Mobile responsive design working
Mobile filter panel opens and closes properly
Hotel cards display PML-style: pink offer badges, gradient View Deal buttons, proper layout
Navbar shows PlanMyLuxe logo, dropdown menus, phone number (020 3940 6622)
Footer matches PML production style (gray #666666 bg, pink underlines)
Montserrat font implemented correctly
PML pink color #CB2187 used throughout (33+ elements)
PML star SVGs with pink fill for ratings
Gradient buttons working
Price range slider with pink styling
Filter checkboxes with pink selection state
Infinite scroll and pagination working
Hotel card layout matches PML design patterns

success_percentage.frontend: 97% (30/31 tests passed - 1 minor mobile interaction issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor mobile filter checkbox interaction issue persists in modal overlay. The mobile filter panel opens correctly but some filter checkboxes have click timeout issues due to potential z-index or event handling problems. This is a low-priority UX issue as desktop functionality is perfect and mobile panel opens/closes correctly.
